schedules_text:
Gate A at (6,9): open exactly when (t mod 4) is in {1, 2}. So it is open at t=1,2,5,6,... and closed at t=0,3,4,7,... You can only step ONTO it at a tick t+1 where it is open.
Gate B at (4,1): open exactly when (t mod 4) is in {1, 2}. So it is open at t=1,2,5,6,... and closed at t=0,3,4,7,... You can only step ONTO it at a tick t+1 where it is open.
Guard P: walks a fixed cycle of length 8. Its position at tick t is determined by (t mod 8) as follows: t mod 8=0: (5,2); t mod 8=1: (5,1); t mod 8=2: (6,1); t mod 8=3: (6,2); t mod 8=4: (7,2); t mod 8=5: (6,2); t mod 8=6: (6,1); t mod 8=7: (5,1). This repeats forever.
Guard Q: walks a fixed cycle of length 4. Its position at tick t is determined by (t mod 4) as follows: t mod 4=0: (6,1); t mod 4=1: (6,2); t mod 4=2: (5,2); t mod 4=3: (6,2). This repeats forever.
parcels_text:
Parcel 1: pick it up at (5,9) (map glyph '1'), deliver it to (8,3) (map glyph 'x'). Pickup and delivery happen automatically when you end a tick on the cell.
Parcel 2: pick it up at (5,4) (map glyph '2'), deliver it to (5,5) (map glyph 'y'). Pickup and delivery happen automatically when you end a tick on the cell.
